The '''Time of Renewal''' was a sacred celebration for the [[Gupin/Legends|Gupins]] of the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. During the ceremony, the Gupins unlocked the [[Juniper Chest]], and young Gupins received their wings and the ability to fly. The ceremony also rejuvenated the Gupins' ability to change shapes.

{{Stub}}
